## What's the problem?

<!-- What user need or capability gap is this addressing? "I want to do X but can't because Y." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the behavior. Wireframes/mockups welcome for UI changes. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why is this one preferred? -->

## Scope

- [ ] Is this already in `REQs.md` or `ROADMAP.md`? If so, link the section.
- [ ] Estimated effort (S <1d / M 1-3d / L >3d):
- [ ] Does it require new secrets, new external services, or schema changes?

<!-- Anything that would need a decision before implementation starts. -->
